expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The top navigation tab bar clips the last visible item mid-text ('Hot Ga...' instead of 'Hot Games'), with no visual affordance like a fade or arrow indicating it is horizontally scrollable.

Game card thumbnails on the right side of both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' rows are cut off mid-image and mid-title (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUN MI...', 'HYPERA PYRAMID...', 'DAR WATE THE CURS...'), making them look broken rather than intentionally hinting at scrollable content.

The jackpot amount displayed on 'Cop the Lot Megaways' ($6,265.28) and '3 Fiend Pots' ($13,015.14) overlap the card visuals but may not update in real-time visually, potentially showing stale data if not live-synced.
The bottom navigation bar icons appear slightly inconsistent in size and weight compared to each other (e.g., the Casino slot icon vs. the Sports basketball icon), reducing visual cohesion.

expected.reasoning: Report 3 describes inconsistent icon sizing and weight in the bottom navigation bar, which matches the expected defect about Casino icon design/layout being broken in that same location.
